title: The Man from Hell's River
writer: James Oliver Curwood, Irving Cummings, Ruth Cummings
actors: Irving Cummings, Eva Novak, Wallace Beery
plot: Though engaged to Pierre, a member of the Royal Mounted Police, Mabella, a girl living at a Canadian fur-trading post, is forced to marry Gaspard, a vicious half-breed who has incriminating evidence about her father, Lopente. Pier...
